name: Andrew Yang
subject: We need 345 people in Pennsylvania to show their support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I’ll get right to it -- we need your help to give our Iowa team the resources they need to win.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh) Yang Gang --

The last time I was in Iowa, we opened up two new field offices. I went to the openings and was greeted by a large number of the Yang Gang. It was an exciting day!

Our third quarter was groundbreaking. But since then, our fundraising has slowed and we haven’t raised the money we need to open more offices in Iowa and the other early primary states.

That’s why my team set a new goal -- $325,000 by tonight to get back on track.

[We need you to be one of 345 people in Pennsylvania to step up and make a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today. Please pitch in now:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=5&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=8&amount=25&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---
Together, we are building a campaign that is breaking the mold at every turn.

But we still need to do the important groundwork in Iowa that will win us this election. I’m looking forward to being able to go to another office opening in the Hawkeye State soon.

**To help us hire more organizers in Iowa, rush a contribution today:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/325k-goal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=7)**

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14726?t=6&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1915%2E377263%2E82xwVh) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: CBS News update
subject: Bennet: Trump is a "treasonous MF"

| Friends,

It's been clear since day one that Donald Trump doesn't care about our country's security, human consequences, or reality. He only cares about himself and his political and financial ambition -- putting his needs before the American people's.

[Michael hit the nail on the head last week when he said Donald Trump is a "treasonous MF."](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee9/134673f2/a1bc8ad/6997f848/500121028/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

We need a candidate that can stand up to Donald Trump, and it's clear that Michael Bennet is the man for the job!

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Susan Collins launched her first TV ad of this campaign over the weekend.
body:
Susan Collins launched her first TV ad over the weekend!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca8/4bef7a87/6b2990c8/287fde54/4190493076/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Big news -
**Susan Collins launched her first TV ad over the weekend!**
You know what that means? This race is heating up - and I need to know you're with me:
[**Make a $3 contribution to support our campaign today. Together, we will defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Maine first.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca8/4bef7a87/6b2990c8/287fde2b/4190493076/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191021-2-full")
Control of the Senate is at stake, so Mitch McConnell and big Republican donors will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat for Collins. They'll try to use their money to stop our momentum.
I know this grassroots team won't sit back and let them do that. But how we respond today - in this moment - will determine how the rest of this campaign plays out. That's why I have to ask:
[**Chip in $3 now and let 's show Susan Collins, Mitch McConnell, and all her special interest donors that we are ready for this fight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca8/4bef7a87/6b2990c8/287fde2b/4190493076/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191021-2-full")
Let's do this,
\- _Sara_
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca8/4bef7a87/6b2990c8/287fde2b/4190493076/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191021-2-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca8/4bef7a87/6b2990c8/287fde2a/4190493076/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca8/4bef7a87/6b2990c8/287fde29/4190493076/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Why I walked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I just finished a 105-mile, 8-day walk across New Hampshire. Along the way, I met small business owners, students, prison inmates, homeless vets, seniors, scientists, athletes, and laborers. **I went looking for America — and did I ever find it!**
[**Please enjoy this quick video of highlights from my walk and contribute to help me keep walking in the shoes of all Americans:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11091981/112562403/2142984568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc5MjQ0Yi1iZmY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3KGH21J8ugIGusi9vslUjBcfkCKEA0Jb9ClOVBxm0FY=&refcode=em102219walk)
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11091982/112562404/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc5MjQ0Yi1iZmY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3KGH21J8ugIGusi9vslUjBcfkCKEA0Jb9ClOVBxm0FY=&refcode=em102219walk)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11091983/112562405/566310010?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc5MjQ0Yi1iZmY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3KGH21J8ugIGusi9vslUjBcfkCKEA0Jb9ClOVBxm0FY=&emci=bb8544bc-76f4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=fb79244b-bff4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
I met so many wonderful people along the way, but this is only the beginning. I know I will meet countless more over the coming months.
**I’m running for President because I believe we must unite this country** , and to do that we need a President who all Americans can be confident will be accountable to them — above self, above party, above any special interest. I want to be that President.
Thank you for your support.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11091984/112562406/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc5MjQ0Yi1iZmY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3KGH21J8ugIGusi9vslUjBcfkCKEA0Jb9ClOVBxm0FY=&refcode=em102219walk)

Joe Sestak

Along the way, I met small business owners, students, prison inmates, homeless vets, seniors, scientists, athletes, and laborers. I went looking for America — and did I ever find it! I met so many wonderful people along the way, but this is only the beginning. I know I will meet countless more over the coming months. I’m running for President because I believe we must unite this country , and to do that we need a President who all Americans can be confident will be accountable to them — above self, above party, above any special interest. I want to be that President. Thank you for your support. Respectfully, Joe Sestak Come on board. We encourage you to and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times. name: Lerah
subject: I'm really pissed off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
How does a professional politician making less than $20k a year loan their campaign more than half a million dollar?. _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhSTW5wNb)****_
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211967:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)
| **Pink Slip Noitice**

**Who** : Professional Politicians
**Why:** Failure to drain the Swamp. Failure to put AMERICA FIRST

**I need to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours**. Will you make a contribution today and help me put failed career politicians on notice?

**Contributed?** Yes | **NO
Suggested contribution: $35**

| [** Donate $35 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211968:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)
---

Friend,

Chances are by now you've received a note from me, but in case you need a reminder:
* I'm running to be the**2nd-ever Black female Republican to serve in Congress**
* I have a Ph.D in education; my life's work has focused on ensuring every child has access to a good education.
* I'm a mother of five wonderful children. I'm a christian conservative

I'm not one to use colorful language, but right now - **_I'm really pissed off_**.

**Let me tell you why**.

On one hand I'm ecstatic at the level of support I've received, yet, I feel let down by our country's political system.**Why?** Because one of the Republican's I'm facing off against in the primary - **the epitome of a professional politician, having served in state government for over 20 years on a salary of less than $20,000 per year** \- raised next to nothing but was able to loan her campaign more than **$600,000!!**

| [** GIVE CAREER POLITICIANS THE PINK SLIP
Join my team today ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211968:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)
---

I've been working my tail off trying to build grassroots support for my congressional campaign in Georgia's 7th District - **which next year will be home to one of the most expensive general election campaigns in the entire country**.

And during the most recent quarter, my "**ditch the career politicians** " message seemed to have resonnated across the district and the country, with**more than 7,000 conservatives making a contribution to my campaign**.

My team and I **worked tirelessly for the money we raised** - but the folks I'm running against don't think they have to play by the same rules for the same outcome. And in order to keep my America First campaign alive **[I still need to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211967:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)**

So, **will you stand with me to help root out corruption in politics** while making a contribution today to help me close the gap between me and my career politician opponents?

[** Suggested Donation: $35 »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211968:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)
---

[** Donate $100 »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211969:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)
---

[** Donate Any Ammount »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211969:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)
---

If like me, you think it's fishy that someone making less than $20,000 a year is able to loan their congressional campaign $600,000 - **[then make a statement by joining my movement today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211967:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)**. And if you're able to make a financial contribution to help me close the gap and break through the noise, I would be very appreciative.

Blessings always,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211967:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)

Dr. Lerah Lee

[** Donate Now >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53211967:WhSTW5wNb:m:1:2184552809:317FF586F1C1A0C5E4978D336DD46262:r)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Flirting with socialism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
There's been a socialist resurgence within the Democratic party, and it's not some fringe movement. Even Senate Democrats are engaging in this dangerous flirtation with socialism and trying to market it as "free" government programs. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)
---
Dear N/A,

Recently, there's been a socialist resurgence within the Democratic party, and it's not some fringe movement. Even Senate Democrats are engaging in this dangerous flirtation with socialism and trying to market it as "free" government programs.

N/A, you and I both know there's no such thing as free, and if Senate Democrats are allowed to continue down this path, it's going to cost all of us.

**[The good news is, it's not too late to put a stop to their extremism but we have to act now, and it starts with supporting Senator Martha McSally.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)**

| [ SUPPORT MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)
---

You see, Democrats only need to flip four Senate seats to seize the majority and they think they have a good shot at winning if they can defeat Martha and turn Arizona blue.

Since the day she joined the Senate, Martha has been a thorn in the Democrats' side because she's not afraid to call them out for their irrational ideology and aversion to pragmatism.

**[As a former fighter pilot who flew in combat, Martha knows the price of freedom, and she'll be the first to tell you there's no such thing as "free," especially when it comes to government.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)**

Martha's fighting for pragmatic policy solutions, but Democrats want no part of it, they just want her gone.

**[We can't let that happen, N/A,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)** because as long Democrats willfully ignore the costly realities of their proposals, they have no place dictating our policies.

**[If you agree, join me in supporting Martha McSally today. This is a race we can't afford to lose.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)**

My very best,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)
Nikki Haley

[ SUPPORT MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53212322:sK7t75wdN:m:1:2105898951:56038A8BE903DDE99464EC8406479182:r)
---

subject: Immigrant. Female. Conservative.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Are you ready to vote? Important upcoming elections
body:
| | Peter, I hope this email finds you well. I want to make sure you are aware of the important elections happening in Virginia on **November 5, 2019.** Millions of people will likely stay home and fail to prioritize voting this year. That means your vote carries even more power and influence. And as a person of faith, you have the opportunity to advance and protect the values of religious freedom, marriage and family, the sanctity of life, and care and compassion for those in need. **At My Faith Votes we encourage you to do three simple things:**
1. **Pray** for God’s wisdom.
2. **Think** about the issues from a biblical worldview.
3. **Vote** in every election.

When you vote, you bring the influence of your faith to seek the peace and welfare of the city in which you live (Jeremiah 29:7). We know voting responsibly takes time, so we’ve done all we can to make it extremely easy for you to access party platform guides, learn what’s on your ballot, and check your polling location at our [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=1). We encourage you to use this free resource to learn about the issues and the candidates, and most importantly, pray about your decision before casting your vote. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=2) Thank you for your commitment to bring the solutions of our faith into the public square! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=3)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191022_2wkb4_03&n=7)

Sununu visits Derry with Sen. Regina Birdsell, touts community support for budget work

Sen. Sharon Carson said she plans to submit legislation later this month that would earmark the $2.5 million for the school project if there is a surplus in the state coffers. Without the funds in this biennium, she said it will cost them more money in the long run. “It’s not only costing them more money but they won’t be able to implement programs,” Carson said. “That will have an impact on students. ... If we have the money, we should do this.” [Read More](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjcyNDI4NjYyODQ2NjU3NzgyJmM9ZjFyNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODY2MzkzODQmZD1sN2k2ZzVm.UjEax7EGsIUxsk9NYDfg8X4e3tcs-W_O-LJRrX_xmT4)

| Today, October 12, Newport had the Corbin Covered Bridge Festival. For the full history of the bridge contact the Newport Historical Society. Many events were planned, local artisans and craftsmen had tents where they were demonstrating their crafts. I found the Aurora Bakery tent, chatted with the owner, and learned that the bakery supports Road to Independence, "a non-profit pre-vocational program for individuals with differing abilities". Certainly an organization worthy of support. www.rti-aurora.org.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | NH Senate Republicans In The News! | | | Your New Hampshire Senate Republicans are working hard for you! Please like us on Facebook so you can stay up to date with all of the latest news and information. | | | | | Last week, the governor and Legislature came to a resolution on the outstanding budget issues so that a compromise was passed and signed into law. At the end, the agreement came together quickly — driven in part by the Oct. 1 deadline for the Department of Revenue Administration | | | | | October 9 Sununu visits Derry with Sen. Regina Birdsell, touts community support for budget work State Sen. Regina Birdsell, R-Hampstead, said the funding was due to a lot of hard work from legislators that understood the issues and what towns like Derry are facing when it comes to supporting its school system. | October 3 Sen. Sharon Carson said she plans to submit legislation later this month that would earmark the $2.5 million for the school project if there is a surplus in the state coffers. Without the funds in this biennium, she said it will cost them more money in the long run. “It’s not only costing them more money but they won’t be able to implement programs,” Carson said. “That will have an impact on students. ... If we have the money, we should do this.” | | | | | | Jeb Bradley for State Senate [10:09 AM - Oct 4, 2019]() | ---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | Ruth Ward for Senate [8:11 PM - Oct 12, 2019]() | ---|---|---|--- | Today, October 12, Newport had the Corbin Covered Bridge Festival. For the full history of the bridge contact the Newport Historical Society. Many events were planned, local artisans and craftsmen had tents where they were demonstrating their crafts. I found the Aurora Bakery tent, chatted with the owner, and learned that the bakery supports Road to Independence, "a non-profit pre-vocational program for individuals with differing abilities". Certainly an organization worthy of support. www.rti-aurora.org. | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC P.O. | [Team, a recent poll out of Iowa showed that the number of undecided voters has skyrocketed since July!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee5/134673f2/a1e4dc2/6997f82d/2368451459/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

In spite of this information, the DNC has decided to slash the field of candidates before early state voters have even begun to make up their minds.

Here's the truth: [Early polls aren't predictive of how things will develop and change on the campaign trail over the course of weeks and months.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee5/134673f2/a1e4dc2/6997f82d/2368451459/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Right now, this race is fluid.

Michael is just getting started, and we need your support today to keep him going strong in this fight.

[**So that 's why we're asking, Team. Will you step up and chip in?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee5/134673f2/a1e4dc2/6997f82d/2368451459/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: Will Democrats in 18326 show up to take back the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |

| **Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight: The Senate Will Be Competitive Again In 2020**
Team: FiveThirtyEight made an early prediction about Democrats' chances to take back the Senate in 2020, and so far, they're right.

Democrats in battleground states outraised their Republican opponents in the third quarter, and that's sounding alarm bells throughout the GOP.

If we are going to take back the majority, it will be because Democrats are fired up to turn out to vote. That's why we want to hear from Democrats in 18326 about your commitment to helping us win. Take our one-question survey now:

**How important is it to you that Democrats take back the Senate majority in 2020?**

**[Extremely Important](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df45/693b8b0a/445e8b84/72de633c/1004448999/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

Friends-- We are just two weeks away from one of the biggest elections in years. We have an opportunity to take back the Virginia General Assembly for the first time in decades. You have been one of our most loyal supporters.[ **I wanted to give you a sneak peak of our new ad, where Governor Northam highlights the great work over the last two years and how much more we can do with a Democratic majority.**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d2/39260142/4272d1ba/626395e4/2958966295/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/couragewayahead#edit") In less than two weeks, we can elect a Democratic majority with the courage to stand up to the NRA and pass common sense gun safety laws. [**A contribution of $50, $100 or $250 can help our Democratic candidates with last minute ad buys. **](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d2/39260142/4272d1ba/626395e4/2958966295/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/couragewayahead#edit") The Republicans and the NRA will pull out all the stops in the next two weeks, and we need you to stop them cold. You have stood with us every step of the way, but now, we need you more than ever. Help us win and pave the way ahead for the Commonwealth. **Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor**

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Last night, Mitch McConnell hosted a high-dollar dinner fundraiser for Susan Collins to thank her for promoting his agenda in Washington.
body:
It's everything people hate about politics.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cac/4bef7a87/6b2d320f/287fdf18/2206724198/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Last night, Mitch McConnell hosted a high-dollar dinner fundraiser for Susan Collins to thank her for promoting his agenda in Washington.**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins ' big-dollar, favor-returning fundraising -> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cac/4bef7a87/6b2d320f/287fdf1f/2206724198/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191022-full")
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cac/4bef7a87/6b2d320f/287fdf1f/2206724198/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191022-full")****
Friends,
**Last night, Susan Collins attended an intimate dinner gathering thrown in her honor by Mitch McConnell.**
The invite list? Their wealthy donors and PACs who donated over $10,000 to Collins' reelection campaign.
McConnell is rewarding Collins for being a reliable vote for his agenda in Washington in the form of giant campaign checks!
It's everything people hate about politics. And it's why we are funding our campaign differently -- powered by lots of people giving modest donations. But that means we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins ' high-dollar, special interest, favor-returning fundraising?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cac/4bef7a87/6b2d320f/287fdf1f/2206724198/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191022-full")
Susan Collins' campaign is bankrolled by big donors and corporate PACs. We saw that on her last fundraising report. But if we keep fighting, we're going to replace her with Sara Gideon, a real champion for working people.
All our best,
Team Gideon
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cac/4bef7a87/6b2d320f/287fdf1f/2206724198/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191022-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

"" ** "" Friends, Last night, Susan Collins attended an intimate dinner gathering thrown in her honor by Mitch McConnell. The invite list? Their wealthy donors and PACs who donated over $10,000 to Collins' reelection campaign. McConnell is rewarding Collins for being a reliable vote for his agenda in Washington in the form of giant campaign checks! It's everything people hate about politics. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: It's a Middle-Class Boom -- How Americans are Really Doing Under Trump Economy
body:
"The median or average-income family has seen a gain of $5,003 since Trump came into office. Median family income is now (August 2019) $65,976." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ea750aa82&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **It's a Middle-Class Boom -- How Americans are Really Doing Under Trump Economy**

“The median or average-income family has seen a gain of $5,003 since Trump came into office. Median family income is now (August 2019) $65,976,” Steve Moore writes for Fox Business.

“Under George W. Bush, the household income gains were a little over $400 in eight years, and under Barack Obama the gains were $1,043. That was in eight years for each. Under Trump, in less than three years, the extra income is about three times larger.”

[**Click here to read more.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4a2f6feec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “House Democrats’ top impeachment inquisitor abruptly changed from repeatedly insisting on the testimony of a whistleblower against President Donald Trump to working to prevent it,” Mollie Hemingway writes in _[**The Federalist**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2acd634b9a&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Democrats have dramatically switched from demanding transparency about the whistleblower complaint to hiding depositions, transcripts, and evidence.”
---
|
---
| “The past several weeks in Washington have shown us the worst of the swamp,” Rep. Fred Keller (R-PA) writes for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ed5d780f76&e=3ee4985eea). “The people in my district, both Republicans and Democrats, have repeatedly told me they are sick and tired of the way this non-transparent inquiry is going and the fact that Congress fails to do anything other than focus on tearing down the duly-elected president.”
---
|
---
| “The United States government identified hundreds of migrants allegedly falsely claiming familial status and numerous other migrant adults attempting to pose as minors,” Jason Hopkins reports for _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56b6e3d382&e=3ee4985eea)_. U.S. immigration officials in the El Paso, Texas, area have identified 238 such fraudulent families.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9def3f9859&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7343814075&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8f4c6313c3)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump could have final say on DACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program is about to have its day before the Supreme Court, as lower courts have blocked Trump and his racist administration from ending this program and triggering mass deportations. Now, Trump's two appointed justices, Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, could hold the swing votes that determine the future of DACA recipients and immigrants as a whole. Nearly a million people have relied on this program, allowing them to seek employment and work, contributing taxes as active members of our communities. They are our neighbors, friends, and families. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We're asking voters what their thoughts are so we can understand where you stand on this critical issue: **Do you support DACA?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda7/6e9863e8/15a59f4a/1db08d9d/1651878943/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NC35p7mX") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda7/6e9863e8/15a59f4a/1db08d9d/1651878943/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NC35p7mX") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda7/6e9863e8/15a59f4a/1db08d9c/1651878943/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191022a.ND&refcode2=k6ieZ6h3WBhe9krC4P92")

name: Warren 2020
subject: Tell us where to send your free sticker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Yesterday, Elizabeth introduced a new plan to invest in public schools and ensure every kid in America has access to a high-quality public education. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528162/45c30650/102caea67/66f32275/923040677/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Yesterday, Elizabeth introduced a new plan to invest in public schools and ensure every kid in America has access to a high-quality public education.

This plan was special -- because public schools have been powerfully important for Elizabeth. She attended public school, taught at public schools, and says that public school made her into who she is today.

**That's why -- for a limited time only -- we're offering a free "Public School Made Me" sticker to all who want it. All you have to do is tell us where to send it.**

**[If public school made you, too, we've got a free sticker for that. Fill out this form to let us know where to send your free "Public School Made Me" sticker>>](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528162/45c30650/102caea67/66f32274/923040677/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LOTJQX1NUS19FRFVfV18yMDE5MTAyMl9WMVMyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/psmm-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK92P_STK_EDU_W_20191022_V1S2")**

Students, educators, and parents deserve a president who will fight for them, and they deserve a Secretary of Education who believes in public schools.

Elizabeth's plan will fund schools adequately and equitably so that we provide all students with access to a great public education, treat teachers and staff like the professionals they are, stop the privatization and corruption of our public education system, and much more.

**We're going to fight to make sure every kid in America has the same access to a high-quality public education.**

**[Sign up now and get your free sticker to support Elizabeth's new plan and show that you're proud to be made by public school.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528162/45c30650/102caea67/66f32274/923040677/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LOTJQX1NUS19FRFVfV18yMDE5MTAyMl9WMVMyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/psmm-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK92P_STK_EDU_W_20191022_V1S2")**

name: Mike Turner
subject: Keep Ohio Red
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

I'm Mike Turner. As your representative, I know that Southwest Ohio and the Miami Valley are an important economic driver for our state. I have prioritized the people of this community over outside special interests.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
I'm Mike Turner. As your representative, I know that Southwest Ohio and the Miami Valley are an important economic driver for our state. I have prioritized the people of this community over outside special interests.
I will continue to work for our local communities in Congress while my opponent supports policies that will negatively affect our local economy. [_**While I 'm fighting for the interests of area residents, my opponent aims to turn this part of the state into somewhere that resembles San Francisco, Detroit, or New York City! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I need your help! Pelosi and her Squad are throwing everything they have into their new liberal candidate. They want more than anything to flip this seat Blue in 2020. [_**We can 't allow this to happen!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Congress needs to get back on track to focus on the important issues affecting our communities like the opioid epidemic ravaging our communities and providing the proper healthcare to our veterans. I am running for reelection to fight back against these socialist policies and to ensure Wright-Patterson Air Force base sees continued growth year after year.
[_**This election will be critical for the future of the Buckeye State! Help me defeat the liberal special interests propping up my opponent!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Donate $50 to Keep Ohio Red today!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Donate $45 to Keep Ohio Red today!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Donate $35 to Keep Ohio Red today!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Donate Any Amount to Keep Ohio Red today!>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
Thank you,
Mike Turner
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDA5NDI0NTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjAzNTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Karl Dean
subject: a brighter future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
I'll never given up on a brighter future for Tennessee – it's going to take hard work, but I know we'll get there. Health care needs to be more affordable and more accessible. We need better jobs, and better public schools. We need to be investing in our citizens and our communities.
We need leadership that will move Tennessee forward.
The Tennessee Democratic Party is on the frontline every day – recruiting, training, and preparing candidates who share our values and will work for the good of every Tennessean. It shouldn't matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray or who you love.
Will you join me, and show them your support with whatever you can?
Thank you,
Karl

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: I won't let him get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We know Rep. Smith has dedicated his career to taking away women's rights. I'm dedicating my career to fight for it.
|
---

| | Friends, Ever since President Trump took office, women's rights have been rolled back left and right. That same agenda has been here in the 4th District of New Jersey for over **38 years**. Rep. Chris Smith has voted repeatedly to ban reproductive rights and refuses to reauthorize critical protections for women who are victims of violence. But as a champion of reproductive health care and human rights **I** **won 't let him get away with this type of rhetoric or decades-old policies.** I've dedicated my life--whether at the State Department or Center for Reproductive Rights--to fighting for the rights of women and girls in the United States and throughout the world. [**Will you join me in this fight to protect women 's rights and donate $20 or anything you can?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0be/522d4087/7afda44c/4f342860/2681758259/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191022_em&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+in+this+fight+to+protec&utm_campaign=20191022_em&source=20191022_em") | **[Donate $20](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0be/522d4087/7afda44c/4f34289f/2681758259/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191022_em&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Donate+20&utm_campaign=20191022_em&source=20191022_em")**
---
Growing up in New Jersey taught me the meaning of hard work and the importance of service. That's why I won't stop until we win this fight because _it 's the right thing to do._
Smith has led the destructive global gag rule that prevents women and girls around the world from receiving reproductive aid. Smith is actively trying to make women **second-class citizens in New Jersey and beyond --and I'm running to stop him.**
**Look friend --this fight is personal to me. And it should be for you too.** [**Can you pitch in $20 to make sure a women 's rights champion is elected to Congress?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0be/522d4087/7afda44c/4f34289e/2681758259/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191022_em&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+pitch+in+20+to+make+sure+a+women&utm_campaign=20191022_em&source=20191022_em")
**[Donate $20](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0be/522d4087/7afda44c/4f34289d/2681758259/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191022_em&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Donate+20&utm_campaign=20191022_em&source=20191022_em")**
---
Let's win this fight together,
Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. I'm dedicating my career to fight for it. | | | Friends, Ever since President Trump took office, women's rights have been rolled back left and right. That same agenda has been here in the 4th District of New Jersey for over 38 years. Rep. Chris Smith has voted repeatedly to ban reproductive rights and refuses to reauthorize critical protections for women who are victims of violence. But as a champion of reproductive health care and human rights I won 't let him get away with this type of rhetoric or decades-old policies. I've dedicated my life--whether at the State Department or Center for Reproductive Rights--to fighting for the rights of women and girls in the United States and throughout the world. "" | "" Growing up in New Jersey taught me the meaning of hard work and the importance of service. That's why I won't stop until we win this fight because it 's the right thing to do. Smith has led the destructive global gag rule that prevents women and girls around the world from receiving reproductive aid. Smith is actively trying to make women second-class citizens in New Jersey and beyond --and I'm running to stop him. Look friend --this fight is personal to me. And it should be for you too. Team Zoe

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Stand up to support children's healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The GOP has made it their m.o. to take away healthcare from anyone and everyone \-- they led an unsuccessful campaign to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and when that failed, they took it court and may undo the whole thing. The Children's Health Insurance Program helps states provide health insurance to families with children, extending much-needed coverage to 8.9 million children in America. Now, under the GOP's watch, the rate of uninsured children has risen, and they haven't expanded CHIP to cover the gaps created. They are leaving millions of children dangerously uninsured. [**We need you to stand up and show your support today. Please add your name to ours and urge Congress to expand CHIP so that children can grow up happy and healthy!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda8/6e9863e8/15a7da9b/1db08dd1/1617550881/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/expandchip/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for supporting our children. subject: Last night was unreal, thank you
body:
| |
---

---|---
| | [](http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cd51c30218&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Forward to Friend](http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cd51c30218&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
|
## Last night was unreal- Thank you
---
|
---
| | I am blown away by last night's results. I think it's safe to say that I wouldn't still be in this competition without your support.

Lindsay and I have been working hard to stay in this and improve our scores each week, and we're definitely seeing progress, but your votes have kept us in this. It means so much to me that you take the time out of your busy nights and lives to send in text votes and login online to give us your support.
---
|
---
| | It has been a highlight of my experience to be able to share it with others. Through the [Yellow Ribbon Fund](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b696b384d4&e=f6564bbe3b), I have been able to invite 2 wounded veterans and their caregivers to have a night out in the ballroom each week. Last night we were able to have 5 caregivers come out for a caregivers night out.

The Yellow Ribbon Fund supports our injured veterans, providing support and resources for their caregivers and support systems in a variety of ways. I'm so grateful to YRF and these caregivers who make sacrifices to support and care for our wounded servicemen when they come home.

Learn more about the great work YRF does [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c2b80fedac&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| **You can still get all your Spicer Arnold "campaign gear" on[ SpicerArnold.com](www.spicerarnold.com) and all the proceeds will benefit The Yellow Ribbon Fund and The Independence Fund, another organization that helps provide support to our wounded veterans after coming home from war. **
---
| **Thanks again everyone- see you Monday for "Halloween Night",

_Sean_**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

Learn more about the great work YRF does . | You can still get all your Spicer Arnold "campaign gear" onwww.spicerarnold.com and all the proceeds will benefit The Yellow Ribbon Fund and The Independence Fund, another organization that helps provide support to our wounded veterans after coming home from war. | Thanks again everyone- see you Monday for "Halloween Night", Sean | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 RigWil LLC, All rights reserved.

Ben Ray

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b469/18e32a7f/53b0151f/7b237c48/803740336/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b469/18e32a7f/53b0151f/7b237c49/803740336/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b469/18e32a7f/53b0151f/7b237c4e/803740336/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b469/18e32a7f/53b0151f/7b237c4f/803740336/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. | | Friends,

The reports are in, and we did it! We were the top Republican fundraiser in Nevada’s 4th congressional district last quarter. With $127,998.66 raised, we showed the community that we can run a grassroots campaign with widespread support and positive messaging.

We may be winning the first round, but the fight isn’t over. Congressman Horsford has a 2-year head start on me. He took in more than $637,000 from D.C. PACs and special interest groups that he used to work for as a DC lobbyist.

Last quarter we raised 100% of our money from people, not PACs or special interest groups, and the country is paying attention.
**

_Rising GOP Congressional Candidate Lisa Sutton Dominates Fundraising Efforts In Primary_**

_Rising Nevada Republican congressional candidate Lisa Sutton raised more money during the third quarter than any of the other six Republican primary challengers that she faces in Nevada’s 4th Congressional District._ **[_Read More_](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=2dc9256d1e&e=591bcd9d3e)**

name: Wilmot HQ
subject: It's been a while
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
Do you still want our updates?
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed508/3616776547/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=header")
Hey Friend,
The team noticed you haven't opened or engaged with one of our campaign updates in a while.
Your time is valuable, so we're checking in to see if you still want to get updates from the campaign trail. **Let us know if you 're still with us in the fight to flip Montana blue by using the buttons below:**
[Keep Me Updated On The Campaign!](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed509/3616776547/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://www.facebook.com/WilmotCollinsforSenate/")

[Unsubscribe](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed506/3616776547/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
These updates are a direct link between Wilmot and his supporters like you. It allows us to make sure we're hitting the mark on what issues matter most to you, and for you to get a backstage glimpse into Wilmot's campaign. We believe in _transparency and accountability._
It's evident that Steve Daines most prioritizes his big oil and special interest backers.
But we prioritize **you.** The only way we can keep these campaign wheels spinning is with your continued support, input and engagement.
**If you are in this for the long haul, take 10 seconds right now to make sure your contact preferences are accurate and up to date!**
Thanks for being on Team Wilmot.
Best,
Wilmot HQ

Wilmot Collins is Montana's first black mayor, a 20+ year U.S. military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. As Montana's next Senator, Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, job creation and economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands.
[CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed507/3616776547/VEsC/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=1910-bio-box&recurring=auto")

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed506/3616776547/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed504/3616776547/VEsA/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646bf/1e3760f0/6911ae88/5f7ed505/3616776547/VEsB/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-q3-wc?refcode=footer")

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: [WaPo Update]: the GOP needs Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Did you see this? The Washington Post says that Minnesota could be key to Republicans holding their Senate majority. Chip in to now to protect Tina and keep Minnesota BLUE >>

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191022wapo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | **WASHINGTON POST REPORTS:
MINNESOTA COULD BE KEY TO THE REPUBLICANS' SENATE MAJORITY**

We won't let that happen. Donate $10 or more to fund our ground operation to keep Minnesota BLUE:

[DONATE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191022wapo-full-callout&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

Trump is on the move, Team. He's rallying supporters on stage in Minneapolis, has a plan to flood our state with millions of campaign dollars, and is doing everything he can to help his endorsed candidate, Jason Lewis, defeat Tina and turn Minnesota red.

If we want to take back the Senate, protect the future of the Supreme Court, and actually move this country forward together, we need strong Democrats like you to dig deep, right now, and join us.

**[We need 220 more donations to hit our mid-month goals. Donate $10 or more to fund our ground operation to stop the Republicans from holding onto their Senate majority for years to come.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191022wapo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation= amount=auto")**

Trump and Lewis are two of a kind, and they are going to work hand-in-hand in this election -- we need to be ready for whatever they do next. **With reproductive health care and the Supreme Court on the line, we need to come together now and put everything we've got behind protecting Minnesota's seat.**

**We need to act now so we can be prepared for any attacks coming from Trump and Lewis. Our grassroots movement can stop Trump and the GOP from winning Minnesota. We're halfway through October, and we need 220 more donations to hit our mid-month goals.**

**[Pitch in $10 or more right now to protect Tina against the Trump and Jason Lewis alliance and keep Minnesota BLUE.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191022wapo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation= amount=auto")**

body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b903a1/30fd46cd/32e8a11c/2354be45/2520744199/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all") Hey there --

Something you may not know about me is that I'm a BIG baseball fan. And I'm very excited about the World Series this weekend.

**But I 'm even more excited than usual because this year, I'm inviting a lucky winner (and their guest) to come watch the World Series with me!**

Here's how it works:

Chip in ANY amount ($1, $25, $100!) and you'll be automatically entered to win two club-level seats to the World Series on Saturday 10/26. And we'll cover the airfare and hotel to get you and a guest to the game! **[DON'T WAIT! Chip in right now and you could win a FREE trip to the World Series ->](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_worldseries?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&amount=25&amounts=5,15,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+DONrsquoT+WAIT+Chip+in+right+now+and+you&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all")** | | [ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN ->](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_worldseries?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&amount=25&amounts=5,15,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+ENTER+FOR+A+CHANCE+TO+WINnbsprarr&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all")
---
[](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_worldseries?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&amount=25&amounts=5,15,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all")
When you arrive, I'll have two seats next to me reserved just for you. We'll chat about baseball, politics, news... or whatever you like!

**I can 't wait for this World Series -- and it would mean the world to me to have you join me. Chip in for your chance to win the free trip:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/World-Series](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_worldseries?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&amount=25&amounts=5,15,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=5+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomWorldSeries&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.22_e1_jkd_world-series_all")**

Good luck!
John

One winner will receive a trip for two (2) to Washington, DC, consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize winner and one (1) guest from the major U.S. airport nearest the Prize winner's residence within the forty-eight (48) contiguous United States, to Washington, DC; (ii) hotel accommodations for the Prize winner and one (1) guest (one (1) room, double occupancy) on October 26, 2019 (one (1) nights' stay); and (iii) two (2) club level tickets to Game 4 of the World Series® to be used by the Prize winner and one (1) guest. Winner will be selected by random drawing from all eligible entries to be held on or about 10/25/2019. The prize may be forfeited and awarded to an alternate eligible winner if two attempts to contact the winner by phone or email are not successful. Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico; those 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law); and those who would be lawfully permitted to accept the prize under applicable federal, state and local law. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: This is an email about baseball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
With the World Series beginning tonight, I wanted to send you a note about baseball, a pitch they called "The Hickenlooper Curve," and what it taught me about playing the long game. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a79411/1314337772/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, with the World Series beginning tonight, I wanted to send you a note about baseball, a pitch we called "The Hickenlooper Curve," and what it taught me about playing the long game.

[**_(We 're playing a very long game here in Colorado--and bringing this home next November will take a team effort. Can you chip in now?)_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191022_JH_20191022-fr-JH-curve-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Back in my Little League days, my coaches and teammates quickly saw that hitting was, to put it mildly, not a forte of mine. So in my backyard, with the help of my teammate and friend Henry Baird, I focused on developing the only skill I thought I had a reasonable chance of mastering: pitching.

For an hour or more every day, Henry and I would work on my pitches. My bread and butter was my curveball, what we called the "Big Bender" or the "Hickenlooper Curve." For a long time, my curveball wasn't much to write home about--but after more than two years of work, that pitch started to really curve.

**The guys who 'd stood around laughing at the gangly teenager on the mound started striking out. And I started to believe--for the first time, really--in the wisdom of playing the long game.**

As we get ready for the World Series to kick off tonight, I'm thinking about the fact that we're about a year out from next year's election. That's a long time, and while we can win this, we need to be ready for any curveballs that might come our way from the other side.

Cory Gardner, Mitch McConnell, and their allies are gathering forces and resources to hold on to this seat--and the best way to respond is to make sure that we can fight back at every turn--**whether it 's this month, next spring or summer, or on the day before Election Day, in the bottom of the ninth.**

[**_Chip in now to make sure we 're ready to handle anything they throw our way._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191022_JH_20191022-fr-JH-curve-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Batter up,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191022_JH_20191022-fr-JH-curve-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a7940d/1314337772/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a7940a/1314337772/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a7940b/1314337772/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a79408/1314337772/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a79409/1314337772/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a79406/1314337772/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771480/691c9bd/6fdd4ca0/11a7940d/1314337772/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The ultra-rich aren't paying their taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In 2018, the 400 richest families in America were taxed at a lower rate than the bottom 50% of the country for the first time. Let that sink in. This means that a teacher working a second job as a barista to make ends meet and an ironworker working long hours every day to feed their families both had more of their hard-earned income taxed than a billionaire running a big bank and getting multi-million dollar bonuses. We have the Trump 2017 tax bill to thank for this. Trump and the GOP only care about making their large donors even more wealthy while placing the entire burden on the working class because they've been getting away with it for years \-- but we're putting a stop to that. We're pushing back in 2020 and putting average Americans back in the saddle of government, but before we finalize our plans, we need to hear from you: **Should the ultra-rich pay their fair share of taxes?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddaa/6e9863e8/15a169f3/1db08dd6/79060535/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/9gQvlNo9") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddaa/6e9863e8/15a169f3/1db08dd6/79060535/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/9gQvlNo9") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddaa/6e9863e8/15a169f3/1db08dd4/79060535/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191022c.ND&refcode2=qP95sDJIJcWLIJvLlo3n")
---

Washington, DC 20003

There's no better way to rebuke Donald Trump (who described climate change as a hoax) than for Congress to OFFICIALLY declare a climate crisis. **But we haven't heard from you, still -- can you add your name?** **SIGN THE PETITION: [I believe that climate change is a planetary crisis and should be declared an emergency by Congress.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f61b/3850643934/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+I+believe+that+climate+change+is+a+plane&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")** | | | [I will add my name](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f61a/3850643934/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+I+will+add+my+name&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
---
* * *
_**PREVIOUS MESSAGE:**_
[**For the first time in U.S. history, Congress could vote on declaring climate change a national emergency.**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f619/3850643934/VEsD/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+For+the+first+time+in+US+history+Congres&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f618/3850643934/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
There's no better way to rebuke Donald Trump (who described climate change as a hoax) and climate change denying Republicans than for our nation to take the critical step in declaring a national emergency on the issue.
**SIGN THE PETITION:** [**I believe that climate change is a planetary crisis and should be declared an emergency by Congress.**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f667/3850643934/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+I+believe+that+climate+change+is+a+plane&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
| | [I will add my name](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f666/3850643934/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+I+will+add+my+name&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
---
## Momentum is on our side for the first time in years, everyone.
The House, for the first time in a decade, passed legislation designed to address climate change and formed a Select Committee on the Climate Crisis.
**Multiple Presidential candidates** are calling climate change a "crisis" and an "emergency" with more than a dozen supporting a Democratic debate on climate change as well championing a Green New Deal.
This is our chance to send a message to Donald Trump, every Republican who denies the science and reality of climate change, and the entire world: **We WILL step up to act because this is an existential threat and a national emergency.**
**[Will you join Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in their call to declare climate change a national emergency? If so, sign here >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f665/3850643934/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+join+Bernie+Sanders+and+Alexand&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")**
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f664/3850643934/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
| | [It's time to act >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f663/3850643934/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+Its+time+to+act+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")
---
Thank you,
314 Action Climate Update

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4416/4bd7760e/44c043c4/77a2f660/3850643934/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2&source=314_EM_EN_192022_BernieAOCRally_U2_X2")

You haven't signed yet -- "" "" There's no better way to rebuke Donald Trump (who described climate change as a hoax) than for Congress to OFFICIALLY declare a climate crisis. Betsy DeVos refers to public schools as a "dead end." She's dead wrong.

Elizabeth believes in public schools, she attended and taught at public schools, and she'll fight for the big, structural changes that would help give every student the resources they need to thrive.

**Tell the world you're ready to fight for public schools alongside Elizabeth with your very own "Public School Made Me" sticker -- you just have to tell us where to send it.**

Team Warren
