name: Team Beto
subject: NEW: Final ratings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Just in.

The official ratings are out from last week’s debate in Westerville, Ohio.
More than 8 million people tuned in to watch. 8.3 million to be exact. And
what they saw from Beto is a leader with the courage to fight for all of
us — and for the future we believe in. But as it stands right now, Beto
will NOT be up there for the next one.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39474?refcode=ema20191022-62963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=62963%2E444211%2EOEH1gb ]We’re about to explain why it’s so critical but can you rush a
$3 or anything you can pitch in to help Beto qualify for the
next debate? Every dollar counts as we work each day to meet the DNC’s
final requirement.

Only 9% of Democratic voters say they’ve made up their minds on who
they’re supporting in this election. 91% have NOT fully decided on a
candidate. That’s why voters are tuning in to the debates. And people
really watch these things!

Take a look:

* 18.3 million people tuned in on one night alone for the first debate.
* 13.8 million people tuned in on one night alone for the second
debate.
* 14 million people tuned in for the third debate, hosted in Houston.
* 8.3 million people watched the fourth debate last week in Ohio.

November’s debate could very well set a new record for viewers as more
Americans really start to tune in. And unless we get to work right now and
change things, they won’t see Beto up there when they do.

Everyone is asking whether our grassroots movement will be enough to
qualify for the next debate. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39474?refcode=ema20191022-62963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=62963%2E444211%2EOEH1gb ]We have to prove ourselves right now—make
a donation of $3 and help us stay competitive when it
matters most.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39474?refcode=ema20191022-62963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=62963%2E444211%2EOEH1gb ]Contribute $3

We know Beto works hard—no one can dispute that. He hosts town halls all
the time. He hits the road to visit as many places as he can get to (28
states so far!). He does interviews and roundtables and forums. He’s all
in for us. But there is simply no better way to reach millions of voters
at once than these debates.

Eight candidates have qualified. Thanks for doing your part to make sure
Beto does too.

- Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39474?refcode=ema20191022-62963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=62963%2E444211%2EOEH1gb ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191022footer&t=1023&refcode2=62963_444211_OEH1gb&akid=62963%2E444211%2EOEH1gb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=62963%2E444211%2EOEH1gb

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Michael Bennet
subject: did you see who just attacked me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
how we know the RNC is scared | |
---
| Listen, Team, I didn't win two elections in a swing state by apologizing for Obamacare or making empty promises.

I did it by going everywhere, offering ideas that can win broad support, even in places that don't vote for me. That's how I plan to beat Donald Trump.

[That's also why the RNC is attacking my Medicare-X plan: they're getting nervous.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee1/134673f2/a116aeb/6997f9b5/55179418/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**So I 'm asking you: Will you help me stay in this fight by making a donation of any amount right now? It would mean so much to me if you can >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee1/134673f2/a116aeb/6997f9b5/55179418/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since I haven't spent a lifetime in politics, many voters are just learning who I am.

Despite coming into this race later than most candidates, we've made incredible progress.

When the media said this campaign was a long shot, you helped prove them wrong.

Your support drives this campaign, and I won't stop fighting for this team.

[So I'm asking: Will you make a donation to help me stay in this fight and reach future debates, too?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaee1/134673f2/a116aeb/6997f9b5/55179418/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B2_102219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

**
------------------------------------------------------------
I know we’ve been emailing a lot, Peter, but I really need your input here. We’re less than a month away from EVERY Democrat running for President coming to Georgia. All eyes will be on our state.

Each of the Democrats will do whatever it takes to win the White House and end our U.S. Senate majority. That would mean all of our results being undone. It would mean America would go down the road to socialism.

We have to hold the Democrats accountable, and I’m counting on your help to do so. Please, take our Democrat Accountability Survey now. I want to hear from YOU on this. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/debateinga-accountability-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct22prospects)

Thank you.

David Perdue

From: PerdueSenate.com

Subject: Democrat Accountability Survey

Peter,

The next Democrat debate is in Georgia. All eyes are on our state. But we know the national liberal media will not hold these Democrats accountable for their far-left proposals.

Today’s Democrat Party is the party of socialized medicine, the “Green New Deal,” and open borders. Their radical agenda would undo our results, which have helped create the greatest economic turnaround in modern history.

And now, they’re targeting Georgia. Every Democrat running for President will be here. They will be raising millions from their liberal donors and enjoying the constant benefit of the national liberal media.

We must hold them accountable, together. David has asked us to make sure each of our supporters helps us hold the Democrats running for President accountable.

Take the Democrat Accountability Survey now. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/debateinga-accountability-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct22prospects)

We know the battle for the White House and Senate majority will be decided here in Georgia. So do the Democrats. That’s why the next debate is happening here. We have to push back now, starting by holding the Democrats accountable for their support of radical liberal policies.

Take the Democrat Accountability Survey now. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/debateinga-accountability-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct22prospects)

Thank you for everything.

Team Perdue
